tickets.description: frontend/middleware.ts imports createServerClient from @supabase/ssr directly, violating the boundary rule that Supabase imports must only appear in frontend/lib/auth/. Fix: create frontend/lib/auth/middleware-client.ts that exports a createSupabaseMiddlewareClient(request: NextRequest, response: NextResponse) factory function encapsulating createServerClient with cookie handlers (get/set/remove). Update frontend/middleware.ts to import createSupabaseMiddlewareClient from @/lib/auth/middleware-client and remove the direct @supabase/ssr import. The CookieOptions type import may also move to middleware-client.ts. Keep all routing logic (session check, redirectTo, admin role check) in middleware.ts unchanged.
